argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; let questionId = null; let targetUrl = target; if (target.startsWith('question:')) { const match = target.match(/question:(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; targetUrl = 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + questionId; } else if (target.includes('/question/')) { const match = target.match(/\/question\/(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; targetUrl = 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + questionId; } return { targetUrl, questionId }; }

async (intermediate) => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const writeBtns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(n => (n.textContent || '').includes('写回答') || (n.textContent || '').includes('编辑回答')); if (writeBtns.length === 0) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_write_button', message: 'Write/Edit answer button not found', target_type: 'question', target: '{{ target }}' }; const mainWriteBtn = writeBtns.find(n => !n.closest('.QuestionAnswers-answerForm')) || writeBtns[0]; mainWriteBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return { clicked: true }; }

async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; const text = '{{ text }}'; const execute = {{ execute }}; const questionId = intermediate.questionId; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const editor = document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); if (!editor) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_composer', message: 'Answer editor not found after clicking write button', target_type: 'question', target }; const container = editor.closest('.AnswerForm, .AnswerFormEditorContainer, .DraftEditor-root'); const submitButton = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => (b.textContent || '').includes('发布回答') && b.className.includes('FEfUrdfMIKpQDJDqkjte')); if (!submitButton) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_submit', message: 'Submit button not found', target_type: 'question', target }; editor.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100)); document.execCommand('insertText', false, text); editor.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, data: text, inputType: 'insertText' })); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 200)); if (!execute) { return { status: 'success', outcome: 'preview', message: 'Answer prepared (not submitted - execute=false)', target_type: 'question', target, prepared_text: text }; } submitButton.click(); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1500)); const href = location.href; const match = href.match(/question\/(\d+)\/answer\/(\d+)/); if (match && match[1] === questionId) { return { status: 'success', outcome: 'created', message: 'Answer created for question ' + questionId, target_type: 'question', target, created_target: 'answer:' + match[1] + ':' + match[2], created_url: href }; } return { status: 'error', outcome: 'unknown', message: 'Answer submission dispatched but result not verified', target_type: 'question', target }; }

variables.name: target
variables.help: Zhihu question URL or typed target (question:123)

variables.name: text
variables.test: 关键是有没有提升生产力
